title: Kitakyushu, Fukuoka — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kitakyushu, Fukuoka: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kitakyushu is a city in Fukuoka with a population of 940,000. An industrial city with a remarkable environmental transformation, stunning views from Mount Sarakura, and affordable living.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
